description: A lively Flemish genre scene showing peasants celebrating in a large barn or interior space. At center, couples dance energetically — a woman in a red skirt and white headdress dances with a man in brown. Around them, other villagers drink at a table, embrace, climb a ladder, and engage in various forms of merrymaking. A round table with a large flat bread or pie is visible at the left. The figures wear typical 16th-century Flemish peasant clothing with white headdresses, doublets, and hose. The atmosphere is boisterous and chaotic.
